overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a suit and fedora exploring a dimly lit ship interior at night. The character moves from an exterior deck through ornate wooden hallways and a cabin, eventually reaching the ship's bridge and exterior deck with visible funnels and ocean views.

events.description: character enters doorway from exterior deck into interior hallway

agents.ego_description: walking from covered exterior deck through doorway into the ship's interior hallway

ornate wall-mounted light fixture with warm yellow glow
wooden door frame leading from deck to interior
cream-colored ornate wooden wall paneling with decorative trim

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered wooden deck at night, illuminated by warm wall sconces. The character approaches and enters a doorway, transitioning into the ship's interior hallway with ornate wall paneling and red carpet.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate interior corridor with wall paneling and red carpet runner

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dimly lit hallway past closed wooden doors

entered.detail: closed wooden doors lining both sides of the hallway
red carpet runner along the center of the hallway floor

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a narrow, enclosed hallway featuring ornate cream-colored wall paneling, warm wall sconces, and a red carpet runner. Wooden doors line both sides of the corridor as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: furnished bedroom with bed, writing desk, and balcony window

events.description: character enters bedroom from the hallway
character approaches window to look out at the exterior deck

agents.ego_description: exploring the bedroom, examining the furnishings and looking out the window at the deck lights

wooden writing desk with papers and chair
lit table lamp on the writing desk providing warm light
large potted palm plant near the window
large window with decorative iron railing visible outside
tall dark wooden wardrobe cabinet

segments.scene_description: The character enters a furnished bedroom containing a metal-frame bed, writing desk with a lit lamp, and a large potted plant. The character approaches a window overlooking an exterior deck with lights, then turns to view the bed and wardrobe before exiting.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior hallway and wooden stairwell leading upward

events.description: enters wooden stairwell and begins ascending to upper deck

agents.ego_description: walking through hallway, entering stairwell, and climbing wooden stairs to upper level

entered.detail: wooden stairs with red carpet runner leading upward
white metal railing along the staircase
round porthole window in stairwell wall

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bedroom and proceeds through the hallway into a stairwell. The segment features ascending a wooden staircase with metal railings and a porthole window, transitioning from the lower deck to the upper bridge area.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship's bridge with navigation wheel transitioning to exterior deck

events.description: arrives at ship's bridge with large wooden navigation wheel
exits bridge onto exterior deck with ship funnels visible

agents.ego_description: exploring the ship's bridge, approaching the ship wheel, then walking along the exterior deck toward the funnels

notable_agents.action: crew member in white uniform standing near the ship's wheel

entered.detail: large wooden ship's navigation wheel with metal spokes
large windows overlooking the dark ocean with distant lights
wooden control panels and levers on the bridge
wall-mounted first aid box with red cross symbol
tall ship funnels with smoke stacks silhouetted against night sky
row of warm lights along the ship's deck railing

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto the ship's bridge, featuring a large wooden navigation wheel and a crew member in white uniform. After exploring the bridge interior, the character exits onto the exterior deck, walking past railing lights toward the ship's smoking funnels against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit exterior deck through the ornate interior of a ship, eventually emerging back outside on the upper bridge. It begins on a covered wooden deck illuminated by warm sconces before the camera follows the character through a doorway into a narrow hallway lined with cream-colored paneling and a red carpet. The scene then shifts as the character enters a furnished bedroom with a lit desk lamp and a window view, before exiting back into the corridor to ascend a wooden staircase past a porthole window. This ascent leads directly into the ship's bridge, where the camera passes a large navigation wheel and a crew member in white. Finally, the movement flows from the bridge interior back onto the exterior deck, passing railing lights toward the smoking funnels against the dark night sky.
